title: AIL Mohali wins 6th HPNLU National Moot
description: A team from Army Institute of Law (AIL), Mohali has won the 6th National Moot Court Competition, 2026 hosted by Himachal Pradesh National Law University, Shimla in collaboration with the National Human Rights Commission of India held on March 26-27, 2026. The AIL, Mohali team members were Simran, Satviki Saran and Parinaz Kaur.The team from School of Excellence in Law, Tamil Nadu Dr Ambedkar Law University comprising Ahamed Akhill R, Harish MS and T Harish emerged as the runners-up team. Harish
